description: National annual series are from the World Bank Open Data API (optional). Subnational choropleth data: one long-format `data.csv` per country. The World Bank series does not provide per-region panels.

subnational.note: Map divisions and base regional metrics: see meta.json `dataset_source` and `data.csv` for this country.

grdp.primary_ref: Table cites Rosstat (rosstat.gov.ru) via Wikipedia; values are nominal GRDP in billion RUB, converted to USD with World Bank official exchange rate (PA.NUS.FCRF).

wikidata.note: Population (P1082) and area (P2046) in km²; code P300 = ISO 3166-2.

gdp_per_capita.method: GRDP (nominal) in USD (total) ÷ population from Wikidata; same units as national GDP p.c. (rough regional analog).
